# Quibble agent contract

This repository uses [quibble](https://github.com/abdullahranginwala/quibble)
for review-grade markdown docs with git-native comment threads.

Open comment threads live in `.quibble/comments/<doc-slug>/`; resolved threads
are archived under `.quibble/comments/_resolved/`. Before working from a doc,
list its open threads with `quibble comments list --doc <doc>`.

> This is a placeholder. The complete agent workflow contract — how to list,
> reply to, and address threads, and the rule that agents never resolve — is
> filled in by milestone M6.
